old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-dski","title":"[spec-compliance] python schc fragment RULE_IDS includes invalid 0x2a","description":"Spec draft-lichen-schc-lora-00.md:4.1 and appendix-schc.md + constants.toml[schc.rule_id] specify frag rules ONLY 0x78 (A-\u003eB), 0x79 (B-\u003eA); 0x00-0x77 reserved for compression. python/src/lichen/schc/fragment.py:14 has RULE_IDS=(0x2a,0x78,0x79); _check_rule(), reassembly.py:272,355 accept 0x2a for ACK/abort/fragments (0x2a seen in meshcore/cmd but not SCHC frag). Violates MUST for exact rule ID semantics. MIC fix in 2baec8afb aligned compute_mic(payload + b\"\\0\") to RFC8724 but left this. KConfig commits (a82425bf8 etc) had no constant/MUST violations. bd auto-commits and merges not relevant to spec/code. Reviewed all 20 commits via git log.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"agent@lichen-project.dev","created_at":"2026-07-23T03:57:16.499972423Z","created_by":"AI Agent","updated_at":"2026-07-23T03:57:16.499972423Z"}
